MINI MINUTES:
No appearances stated, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF WINTERLAND CONCESSIONS CO.'s Motion For Assignment Order is granted. No opposition has been filed. Order signed in open court. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
